spec_match.rationale: The analyzer compares style-heavy and layout-heavy workloads using exact LoAF entry fields and script attribution fields from the origin-trial proposal.

interactive.rationale: The workload intensity slider and both workload buttons update their respective result areas with live LoAF/fallback data.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb now matches the page's style-versus-layout comparison and unsupported-field fallback behavior.

edge_cases.rationale: The page explicitly states that unavailable split fields are unsupported origin-trial state, not meaningful zero values.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5171478175809536.

design_system.rationale: The repaired page uses CSS variables, avoids nested result cards, and has no source inline styles or event handlers.

summary: Open critique items repaired. DevTools MCP verification exercised the workload intensity slider plus run style workload and run layout workload at http://localhost:3000/v147/long-animation-frames-style-duration/style-vs-layout-analyzer/?verify=after-loaf-style-fix. Chrome 148 captured one LoAF entry for each path, displayed baseline combined fallback data, and showed split origin-trial fields as unavailable; no nested result cards were present. Console and network were clean; conformance now reports 4 baseline PASS and 4 origin-trial FAIL in this browser.
